mapper.select: select stu_num.class_id as classId, c.name as className, subject.name as subjectName, cr.name as classroomName, stu_num.num as studentNum, c.planned_student_count as overStudentName from class as c left join (select class_id, count(1) as num from class_student group by class_id) as stu_name on stu_num.class_id = c.id left join classroom as cr on c.classroom_id = cr.id left join course on course.id = c.course_id left join subject on course.subject_id = subject.id where c.id in ( select class_id from class_student where class_student.student_id = #{query.studentId} )
